Notes: Tarleton State wins its 13th in a row to maintain sole possession of first
place in the LSC. Shelby Adamson led the team in scoring and became the
sixth TexAnn all-time to amass 1,400 points for a career.
Game.Officials: Steve Lawrence,  Ken Wappes,  Ashley Benson
